scenarios.description: appendChild(reparentedChild) from parentA with two existing children to parentB with two existing children sets correct siblingIndex on new parent
scenarios.precondition: parentA has children [c1,c2]; parentB has children [b1,b2]; child c1’s siblingIndex initially 0
scenarios.expectedResult: c1 removed from parentA; added to parentB at siblingIndex 2; appendChild returns parentB
pseudocode: TEST TC12 appendChild reparent to non-empty parent
assert parentA.childNodeSize() == 1;         // c2 left in parentA
assert c1.siblingIndex() == 2;               // new index at end
